{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 1991
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 1991
|image           =
|image_size       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 9 - June 2
|num_teams       = 32
|winners       = [[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma (SC)]]
|second       = [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]
|matches         = 62
|goals           = 132
|scoring_leader = [[Gérson da Silva]] (6)
|award          = 
|prev_season      = [[1990 Copa do Brasil|1990]]
|next_season      = [[1992 Copa do Brasil|1992]]
}}

[[File:CopadoBrasil1991.png | thumb | right | 1991 Brazil Cup Trophy]]
The '''Copa do Brasil 1991''' was the 3rd staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]].

The competition started on February 9, 1991, and concluded on June 2, 1991, with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio Heriberto Hülse]] in [[Criciúma]]. Criciúma lifted the trophy for the first time after a 0–0 draw with [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]].

Only one first-division team, Grêmio, was in the semi-finals, and they were relegated after the [[Campeonato Brasileiro Série A 1991|1991]] season, while none of the other semi-finalists achieved promotion to Série A. This creates a unique situation where all four semi-finalists of the cup played in the second division the following year.<ref>{{cite web | url=https://www.rsssf.org/miscellaneous/ruchii.html#remark | title=Minnows in Cup Finals }}</ref>

Gérson, of [[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético Mineiro]], with six goals, was the competition's top scorer.

==Format==
The competition was contested by 32 clubs in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format where all rounds were played in two legs, and the [[away goals rule]] was used.

==Competition stages==
{{32TeamBracket
| RD1-team01 =[[Sampaio Corrêa Futebol Clube|Sampaio Corrêa (MA)]]
| RD1-team02 ='''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score01=1 1
| RD1-score02=2 3
| RD1-team03 =[[Associação Atlética Colatina|Colatina (ES)]]
| RD1-team04 ='''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score03=1 0
| RD1-score04=3 1
| RD1-team05 =[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA (AL)]]
| RD1-team06 ='''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score05=1 0 (pen: 1)
| RD1-score06=0 1 (pen: 3)
| RD1-team07 ='''[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu (PA)]]'''
| RD1-team08 =[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]
| RD1-score07=1 0
| RD1-score08=0 0
| RD1-team09 =[[Associação Desportiva Confiança|Confiança (SE)]]
| RD1-team10 ='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score09=0 0
| RD1-score10=0 1
| RD1-team11 =[[ABC Futebol Clube|ABC (RN)]]
| RD1-team12 ='''[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score11=1 0
| RD1-score12=1 4
| RD1-team13 =[[Auto Esporte Clube|Auto Esporte (PB)]]
| RD1-team14 ='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score13=0 0
| RD1-score14=1 2
| RD1-team15 =[[Goiânia Esporte Clube|Goiânia (GO)]]
| RD1-team16 ='''[[Fluminense de Feira Futebol Clube|Fluminense (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score15=1 0
| RD1-score16=1 1
| RD1-team17 =[[Caiçara Esporte Clube|Caiçara (PI)]]
| RD1-team18 ='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score17=0 0
| RD1-score18=1 11
| RD1-team19 =[[Ubiratan Esporte Clube|Ubiratan (MS)]]
| RD1-team20 ='''[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma (SC)]]'''
| RD1-score19=1 1
| RD1-score20=1 4
| RD1-team21 ='''[[Sociedade Esportiva e Recreativa Caxias do Sul|Caxias (RS)]]'''
| RD1-team22 =[[Esporte Clube XV de Novembro (Piracicaba)|XV de Piracicaba (SP)]]
| RD1-score21=2 1
| RD1-score22=1 1
| RD1-team23 =[[União Esporte Clube|União (MT)]]
| RD1-team24 ='''[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]'''
| RD1-score23=0 0
| RD1-score24=1 3
| RD1-team25 =[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]
| RD1-team26 ='''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score25=1 1
| RD1-score26=1 2
| RD1-team27 =[[Sociedade Esportiva do Gama|Gama (DF)]]
| RD1-team28 ='''[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]'''
| RD1-score27=0 0
| RD1-score28=1 3
| RD1-team29 =[[Atlético Rio Negro Clube|Rio Negro (AM)]]
| RD1-team30 ='''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score29=1 0
| RD1-score30=1 5
| RD1-team31 =[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco (AC)]]
| RD1-team32 ='''[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]'''
| RD1-score31=1 0
| RD1-score32=1 4

| RD2-team01 ='''Botafogo (RJ)'''
| RD2-team02 =Santa Cruz (PE)
| RD2-score01=1 3
| RD2-score02=0 0
| RD2-team03 ='''Coritiba (PR)'''
| RD2-team04 =Paysandu (PA)
| RD2-score03=3 0
| RD2-score04=0 0
| RD2-team05 ='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD2-team06 =Cruzeiro (MG)
| RD2-score05=3 1
| RD2-score06=1 0
| RD2-team07 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD2-team08 =Fluminense (BA)
| RD2-score07=1 2
| RD2-score08=0 0
| RD2-team09 =Atlético (MG)
| RD2-team10 ='''Criciúma (SC)'''
| RD2-score09=0 0
| RD2-score10=1 1
| RD2-team11 =Caxias (RS)
| RD2-team12 ='''Goiás (GO)'''
| RD2-score11=1 0
| RD2-score12=1 2
| RD2-team13 ='''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD2-team14 =Sport (PE)
| RD2-score13=2 0
| RD2-score14=1 0
| RD2-team15 =Vasco (RJ)
| RD2-team16 ='''Remo (PA)'''
| RD2-score15=0 1
| RD2-score16=0 1

| RD3-team01 =Botafogo (RJ)
| RD3-team02 ='''Coritiba (PR)'''
| RD3-score01=0 1
| RD3-score02=3 1
| RD3-team03 =Corinthians (SP)
| RD3-team04 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD3-score03=1 1
| RD3-score04=1 2
| RD3-team05 ='''Criciúma (SC)'''
| RD3-team06 =Goiás (GO)
| RD3-score05=0 3
| RD3-score06=0 0
| RD3-team07 =Vitória (BA)
| RD3-team08 ='''Remo (PA)'''
| RD3-score07=0 0
| RD3-score08=2 0

| RD4-team01 =Coritiba (PR)
| RD4-team02 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD4-score01=1 0
| RD4-score02=1 1
| RD4-team03 ='''Criciúma (SC)'''
| RD4-team04 =Remo (PA)
| RD4-score03=1 2
| RD4-score04=0 0

| RD5-team01 =Grêmio (RS)
| RD5-team02 ='''Criciúma (SC)'''
| RD5-score01=1 0
| RD5-score02=1 0
}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />1991 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira de Santa Catarina.svg|100px|Santa Catarina]]<br />'''[[Criciúma Esporte Clube|Criciúma]]'''<br />'''First Title'''
|}

==References==
{{Reflist}}
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20070828095332/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr1991.htm Copa do Brasil 1991 at RSSSF]
* https://www.rsssf.org/miscellaneous/ruchii.html#remark

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 1991}}
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|1991]]
[[Category:1991 in Brazilian football]]
[[Category:1991 in domestic association football cups]]
